name: 威脅型（以權勢/媒體為武器）
description: 女主利用對方最在意的東西（名聲、金錢）進行反制。套路是「你敢動我，我就讓全世界看到你的真面目」，將被動局面瞬間反轉。
tags: 製造逆轉爽感，展示女主的智慧成長

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: I called the media today. They are currently waiting at the main gate. If you dare lay a finger on me today, I will let everyone see clearly how you lions abuse your daughter.
examples.context: 製造逆轉爽感，展示女主的智慧成長
